item.title: Homelab downtime update: The fight for DNS supremacy
item.description: Turns out everything DID NOT go offline somehow. Yay!

item.title: My homelab will be down for at least 20 days
item.description: Dang, guess I have to suffer.

item.title: I don't know if I like working at higher levels of abstraction
item.description: AI tools push us to higher abstraction. I'm not sure I like what that costs us.

item.title: Vibe Coding Trip Report: Making a sponsor panel
item.description: I needed to ship this before my surgery, so I vibe coded it. It turned out well enough.

item.title: Some Thorns Have Roses
item.description: Recovery gave me things I didn't ask for and I'm not ready to give them back.

item.title: Using Clankers to Help Me Process Surgery
item.description: At 4 AM in recovery, the machines that never sleep turned out to be exactly the right company.

item.title: Advice for staying in the hospital for a week
item.description: Hard-won wisdom from a week of fluorescent lights and beeping machines.

item.title: The Unbound Scepter
item.description: My post-surgery medication stack gave me the most on-the-nose dream of my life.

item.title: Killing my inner Necron
item.description: On surviving surgery, confronting mortality, and finding peace on the other side.

item.title: Portable monitors are good
item.description: A review of portable monitors for travel
